finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_09.md:292; chapters/chapter_09.md:310; chapters/chapter_09.md:314; chapters/chapter_09.md:318; chapters/chapter_09.md:322; chapters/chapter_09.md:334; chapters/chapter_09.md:338; chapters/chapter_09.md:342; chapters/chapter_09.md:350; chapters/chapter_09.md:358; chapters/chapter_09.md:366; chapters/chapter_09.md:403; chapters/chapter_09.md:411; chapters/chapter_09.md:421
finding_results.notes: Loosened the Petra-Yusuf confrontation across ten edits targeting composed thesis-speech. Yusuf's admission now opens with a technical redirect and false start ('Some of it's — look,') before pushing through to the personal disclosure about Farah's Voss-Kessler, with profanity appropriate to his private register under pressure (line 292). Petra's Stuttgart account now includes explicit self-correction ('Before I stopped calling it that. I should have been faster,' line 310), breaking the tidy monologue pattern. Her reports section is broken with a pause and trimmed of redundant first-person framing (line 314). The death is delivered as a blunt clinical statement first ('She died. Eight months later.') with the clinical detail following (line 318). The investigation passage uses voice flattening rather than literary phrasing (line 322). Petra's evaluation of the patch data drops the quotable formulation ('crude but honest about the damage') for concrete clinical language and a self-aware institutional comparison (line 334). Her non-reporting explanation is broken into shorter pieces with a breath beat and hedging ('I don't know what your motives are'), ending on 'That's the calculation I'm making' rather than thesis-speech about tradeoffs (line 342). Conditions section revised to moderate contraction level throughout (lines 350, 358). Transfer-log warning uses contractions and shorter phrasing (line 366). Petra's blunt virus-analysis advice now uses contractions matching her hedging-dropped blunt register (line 403). Exit lines revised: 'I'm asking as a physician. Not as the medical director.' replaces the composed two-sentence formulation (line 411). Final warning revised to 'Don't assume that being useful to me makes you safe' — specific to the relationship rather than aphoristic (line 421). Narrator admiration of Petra's dialogue removed at two locations (former lines 336-337 and 423-424). Acceptance test criteria met: Yusuf turn with false start/self-correction at line 292; Petra turn with explicit self-correction at line 310 and hedging at line 342.

summary: Revised the Petra-Yusuf confrontation dialogue (lines 292-421) to break composed mini-speeches into pressure-true human speech. Yusuf now redirects technically before admitting personal stakes, with a visible false start. Petra's Stuttgart account includes self-correction and lands on clinical facts rather than literary phrasing. Her evaluation, non-reporting explanation, conditions, and exit lines are de-composed through contraction normalization, shorter turn structures, physical beats, hedging, and concrete institutional language replacing quotable formulations. Two instances of narrator commentary admiring dialogue were removed. All factual disclosures, continuity obligations, and setup/payoff content preserved. Contraction levels aligned to style-bible profiles (Yusuf high, Petra moderate).
